info.title: Hope Apartments API
info.description: Internal and partner API documentation for the Hope Apartments service. Partner apartment access uses `X-API-Key` plus API key scopes. Internal routes accept Bearer JWT or the admin session cookie where documented. When using `/docs` in a logged-in admin browser session, Swagger requests can rely on that existing session automatically.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Internal API key management for partner integrations

get.description: Protected internal OpenAPI document. Requires internal permission `docs:read_internal`. When opened from an authenticated admin browser session, the existing admin session can be used automatically.

401.description: Missing admin session or Bearer token

403.description: Authenticated but missing internal docs permission

get.description: Protected internal Swagger UI. Requires internal permission `docs:read_internal`. If you are already logged in as admin, the browser session is enough to try internal endpoints without manually entering a Bearer token or session cookie.

401.description: Missing admin session or Bearer token

403.description: Authenticated but missing internal docs permission

401.description: Invalid, expired or revoked refresh token

get.description: Returns normalized apartments from onOffice without applying the rental-only source filter. Requires a valid `X-API-Key` with the `apartments:read` scope.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key used to call the apartments endpoint.

403.description: Valid API key without the required `apartments:read` scope

409.description: Another live onOffice sync is already running

503.description: API key auth is not configured on the server

get.description: Returns only rental apartments using the rental-specific onOffice source filter. Requires a valid `X-API-Key` with either the `apartments:read` or `apartments:rental:read` scope.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key used to call the apartments endpoint.

403.description: Valid API key without either the `apartments:read` or `apartments:rental:read` scope

409.description: Another live onOffice sync is already running

503.description: API key auth is not configured on the server

get.description: Returns only apartments matched by the on-sale onOffice source filter (`veroeffentlichen = 1` and `exclusive = 1`). Requires a valid `X-API-Key` with either the `apartments:read` or `apartments:sale:read` scope.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key used to call the apartments endpoint.

403.description: Valid API key without either the `apartments:read` or `apartments:sale:read` scope

409.description: Another live onOffice sync is already running

503.description: API key auth is not configured on the server

get.description: Lists partner API keys. Requires internal permission `api_keys:read`. Accessible to `admin` and `developer` with the current permission matrix.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

post.description: Creates a partner API key. Requires internal permission `api_keys:create`. With the current permission matrix this is effectively admin-only.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

get.summary: API key usage and lifecycle stats
get.description: Returns operational metrics for partner API keys. Requires internal permission `api_keys:read`. Accessible to `admin` and `developer`.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

get.summary: Read API key by public identifier
get.description: Reads a partner API key. Requires internal permission `api_keys:read`. Accessible to `admin` and `developer`.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

patch.description: Updates a partner API key. Requires internal permission `api_keys:update`. With the current permission matrix this is effectively admin-only.

400.description: Invalid path parameter, payload or unsupported scopes

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

post.description: Revokes a partner API key. Requires internal permission `api_keys:revoke`. With the current permission matrix this is effectively admin-only.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

post.description: Reactivates a partner API key. Requires internal permission `api_keys:update`. With the current permission matrix this is effectively admin-only.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

post.description: Rotates a partner API key, returns a new secret once and revokes the previous key atomically. Requires internal permission `api_keys:rotate`. With the current permission matrix this is effectively admin-only.

503.description: Auth or API key service is not configured

get.description: Returns audit log entries. Requires internal permission `audit_logs:read`. Accessible to `admin` and `developer` with the current permission matrix.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Positive integer. Values above 200 are normalized to 200.

503.description: Auth or audit service is not configured

get.summary: Fetch a single apartment by id
get.description: Returns one normalized apartment from the live partner dataset by id. Requires a valid `X-API-Key` with the `apartments:read` scope.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key used to call the apartments endpoint.

403.description: Valid API key without the required `apartments:read` scope

503.description: API key auth is not configured on the server

partnerApiKey.name: X-API-Key
partnerApiKey.description: Partner API key. The key must be active and include one of the documented apartment read scopes for the endpoint being called.

adminSession.name: hope_admin_session
adminSession.description: Admin session cookie issued by `/admin/login`. In the internal Swagger UI this cookie is sent automatically when the browser already has an active admin session.

environment.description: Optional. Unsupported values normalize to `live` in the service layer.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration timestamp string. The backend does not currently enforce a strict date format.
Optional expiration timestamp string. The backend does not currently enforce a strict date format.
